ItacPersonItem.Notes: She was commonly known as Isabella Andreini, and was part of the theatre company Comici Gelosi, for this reason she is sometimes called `La Gelosa`. For more details, see Viginia Cox, The Prodigious Muse, 2011
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
